---
title: "Evaluation: A Systematic Approach Practice Implications"
description: "Practice synthesis for Evaluation: A Systematic Approach."
book_id: "evaluation-systematic-approach"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Practice"
citation_key: "rossi_lipsey_freeman_2004_evaluation_systematic_approach"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch01-chapter-1-an-overview-of-program-evaluation:c0027"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch02-chapter-2-tailoring-evaluations:c0002"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch03-chapter-3-identifying-issues-and-formulating-questions:c0054"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch04-chapter-4-assessing-the-need-for-a-program:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch05-chapter-5-expressing-and-assessing-program-theory:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch06-chapter-6-assessing-and-monitoring-program-process:c0002"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch07-chapter-7-measuring-and-monitoring-program-outcomes:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch08-chapter-8-assessing-program-impact-randomized-field-experiments:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch09-chapter-9-assessing-program-impact-alternative-designs:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch10-chapter-10-detecting-interpreting-and-analyzing-program-effects:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch11-chapter-11-measuring-efficiency:c0001"
  - "chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch12-chapter-12-the-social-context-of-evaluation:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---

## Source

This practice synthesis draws on the chapter notes from *Evaluation: A Systematic Approach* [@rossi_lipsey_freeman_2004_evaluation_systematic_approach].

## Evaluation Practice Implications

- Classify the evaluation question type before selecting methods.
- Check need, program theory, and process before treating impact estimation as meaningful.
- Use program theory to identify relevant outcomes and plausible sources of variation.
- Treat outcome monitoring as useful but insufficient for causal claims.
- Use randomized designs when feasible, but explain practical, ethical, and implementation constraints.
- When using quasi-experimental designs, name likely biases and report limitations plainly.
- Interpret effects through magnitude, uncertainty, practical significance, and subgroup variation.
- Collect cost data early enough to support efficiency assessment.
- Plan dissemination and use around stakeholders, political timing, and professional standards.

## Links

- [Chapter 1: An Overview of Program Evaluation](chapter-01-an-overview-of-program-evaluation.qmd)
- [Chapter 2: Tailoring Evaluations](chapter-02-tailoring-evaluations.qmd)
- [Chapter 3: Identifying Issues and Formulating Questions](chapter-03-identifying-issues-and-formulating-questions.qmd)
- [Chapter 4: Assessing the Need for a Program](chapter-04-assessing-the-need-for-a-program.qmd)
- [Chapter 5: Expressing and Assessing Program Theory](chapter-05-expressing-and-assessing-program-theory.qmd)
- [Chapter 6: Assessing and Monitoring Program Process](chapter-06-assessing-and-monitoring-program-process.qmd)
- [Chapter 7: Measuring and Monitoring Program Outcomes](chapter-07-measuring-and-monitoring-program-outcomes.qmd)
- [Chapter 8: Assessing Program Impact: Randomized Field Experiments](chapter-08-assessing-program-impact-randomized-field-experiments.qmd)
- [Chapter 9: Assessing Program Impact: Alternative Designs](chapter-09-assessing-program-impact-alternative-designs.qmd)
- [Chapter 10: Detecting, Interpreting, and Analyzing Program Effects](chapter-10-detecting-interpreting-and-analyzing-program-effects.qmd)
- [Chapter 11: Measuring Efficiency](chapter-11-measuring-efficiency.qmd)
- [Chapter 12: The Social Context of Evaluation](chapter-12-the-social-context-of-evaluation.qmd)

## Source Chunks

<details class="source-chunks">
<summary>Source chunks</summary>
<ul class="source-chunk-list">
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch01-chapter-1-an-overview-of-program-evaluation:c0027</code></li>

<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch04-chapter-4-assessing-the-need-for-a-program:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch05-chapter-5-expressing-and-assessing-program-theory:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch06-chapter-6-assessing-and-monitoring-program-process:c0002</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch07-chapter-7-measuring-and-monitoring-program-outcomes:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch08-chapter-8-assessing-program-impact-randomized-field-experiments:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch09-chapter-9-assessing-program-impact-alternative-designs:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch10-chapter-10-detecting-interpreting-and-analyzing-program-effects:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch11-chapter-11-measuring-efficiency:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:evaluation-systematic-approach:ch12-chapter-12-the-social-context-of-evaluation:c0001</code></li>
</ul>
</details>

## References
